THE LEGENDER EXUDES PRESTIGE, BEYOND THE SHADOW OF A DOUBT.

THE ELEGANT POISE WITH WHICH IT STANDS, THE FLAIR WITH WHICH IT CARRIES

ITSELF, ALL SUGGEST THAT IT’S BORN WITH HIGH PEDIGREE. NOT SURPRISING WHEN YOU CONSIDER ITS LINEAGE - THE LAND CRUISER AND PRADO. ENOUGH SAID!

PRESTIGE THAT ENTHRALS YOU TRUE TO ITS MONIKER, THE LEGENDER IS A LIVING LEGEND, NO DOUBT. MOREOVER, THE LEGENDER IS BORN TO ENTHRAL; LEFT, RIGHT AND CENTRE. FROM ITS SPLIT QUAD LED HEADLAMPS TO ITS REAR BRAKE LIGHTS AND THE EDGY CUTS AND CREASES, THE LEGENDER OVERWHELMS YOU WITH ITS CHARM LIKE NO OTHER.

THE HALLMARK OF TRUE PRESTIGE TRUE PRESTIGE RUNS DEEPER THAN JUST LOOKS. IT’S MORE THAN WHAT’S ON THE OUTSIDE.

THAT’S WHY THE LEGENDER IS EMBELLISHED WITH PLUSH, VENTILATED DUAL TONE SEATS THAT FEATURE CONTRAST STITCHING AND INTERIOR AMBIENT ILLUMINATION FOR AN OPULENT AMBIENCE.

CROWNING GLORY OF PRESTIGE THE LEGENDER’S PRESTIGE IS AMPLIFIED FURTHER WITH AWESOME CAPABILITIES. ADVANCED TECHNOLOGIES LIKE THE WIRELESS CHARGER LEND PANACHE AND STATURE IN THE URBAN WORLD.

SO THAT YOU’LL BE ABLE TO CALL THE SHOTS AND BE AT THE TOP OF YOUR GAME AT ALL TIMES.
